# Glenn Hanns ACS - Director of Photography

> Glenn Hanns ACS is a Sydney-based Director of Photography with over 20 years of experience across feature drama, long-form documentary, and television series. Accredited member of the Australian Cinematographers Society (ACS). AFTRS alumnus. Credits distributed on Netflix, Lionsgate, Foxtel, Apple, Discovery Channel, NBC Universal and others.

## Core pages

- [About](https://glennhanns.com/about): Biography, filmography, awards, and testimonials from collaborators.
- [Work](https://glennhanns.com/work): Portfolio of selected film and television projects with Vimeo embeds and production stills.
- [Journal](https://glennhanns.com/blog.html): Blog covering cinematography craft, collaboration, and the business of hiring a DOP.

## Blog posts

- [What a Feature Film Cinematographer Does](https://glennhanns.com/blog/what-does-a-feature-film-cinematographer-do.html): The full creative and technical role of a DOP across prep, production, and post.
- [How to Hire a Cinematographer for Feature Film](https://glennhanns.com/blog/how-to-hire-a-cinematographer-for-feature-film.html): A producer's guide to assessing and selecting a DOP.
- [How to Brief a DOP](https://glennhanns.com/blog/how-to-brief-a-dop.html): What information a cinematographer needs from a director before prep begins.
- [Working with Directors](https://glennhanns.com/blog/working-with-directors.html): Long-term creative partnerships and collaborative process.
- [What a TV Series Cinematographer Does](https://glennhanns.com/blog/what-a-television-series-cinematographer-does.html): The episodic visual craft of a DOP across a drama series.
- [TV Drama Series Director of Photography](https://glennhanns.com/blog/tv-drama-series-director-of-photography.html): Visual authorship across a season of television.
- [What a Short Film Cinematographer Does](https://glennhanns.com/blog/what-a-short-film-cinematographer-does-and-why-it-matters.html): The DOP's role on short form drama and why it matters.
- [Cinematographer vs Camera Operator](https://glennhanns.com/blog/cinematographer-vs-camera-operator.html): The difference in role, responsibility, and creative authority.
- [What Award-Winning Cinematographers Bring](https://glennhanns.com/blog/what-award-winning-cinematographers-bring.html): What peer recognition signals about craft and professional standing.
- [The Strategic Value of a Director of Photography](https://glennhanns.com/blog/the-strategic-value-of-director-of-photography-services.html): Visual systems, departmental leadership, and tactical judgment under pressure.
- [Moon Rock For Monday: Cinematography Breakdown](https://glennhanns.com/blog/moon-rock-for-monday-cinematography.html): Production detail on the ACS Gold Award-winning feature film.
- [Forbidden Ground: WWI Cinematography Breakdown](https://glennhanns.com/blog/forbidden-ground-cinematography.html): Camera, lens, and lighting approach on the WWI period feature.
- [Josh Groom: Editor in the Director's Chair](https://glennhanns.com/blog/editor-in-the-directors-chair-josh-groom.html): Creative collaboration with director and editor Josh Groom.

## Contact

- Email: glenn@glennhanns.com
- Phone: +61 421 667 205
- Location: Sydney, NSW - available across Australia and internationally
